endpoints.name: Return a Division
endpoints.description: Single Division which has the specified Id
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DIVISIONID}} with a real divisionid. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Return Divisions results grouped by party
endpoints.description: Division results which meet the specified criteria grouped by parties
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Return voting records for a Member
endpoints.description: List of voting records for a member which meet the specified criteria.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Return a list of Divisions
endpoints.description: List of Divisions which meet the specified criteria
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Return total results count
endpoints.description: Total count of Divisions meeting the specified criteria
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.
